name: 05-27-stage2-rvv-macc-route-family-owner
title: Stage2 RVV multiply-accumulate route-family owner
description: Introduce or extract a plugin-local RVV MAcc/accumulation route-family owner across selected-body realization, provider route construction, and target artifact ABI consumption. Primary consumer: computed-mask MAcc; adjacent consumer: runtime-scalar or scalar-broadcast MAcc.
